scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:local: node scripts/setup-local.js && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix mobile && docker compose up -d --wait db && concurrently --names "backend,mobile" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mobile
